---
title: "Marketing Campaign Analysis"
author: "Waranya Ratirotjanakul (36851256)"
format: 
    html: 
        toc: true
    pdf: 
        toc: true
---

```{r setup}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

# load in all the used library
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
```

# Introduction section

# Research Question section

# Dataset Introduction section

# Dataset Description section

## Report detail

# Results section
